text: I feel a peculiar mix of curiosity and unease. The dim, modern space with reflective glass and utility objects abandoned on the floor evokes both anticipation and caution. Moving through the doors into the exhibition, I'm greeted by bold, futuristic graphics about Research and Development, and screens displaying information. This setting stirs a sense of anticipation for discovery, alongside an awareness of the unknown—the allure and uncertainty of innovation manifested in physical space.
